page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9ae.16xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture utilizing an AMD EPYC 9T95 processor running at a clock speed of 2.25 GHz. The instance is configured with 64 dedicated physical cores and 64 vCPUs, maintaining a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio. It is equipped with 256.0 GB of system memory, which translates to 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance does not include local storage, requiring external block storage volumes for operating system and data storage needs. It provides a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing capabilities without resource contention. From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio offers a balanced resource density suitable for workloads requiring steady-state performance without the premium cost of memory-optimized or GPU-accelerated hardware.

The ecs.g9ae.16xlarge is designed for general-purpose workloads. Appropriate use cases include enterprise applications, web serving, application servers, mid-sized databases, and containerized microservices that benefit from dedicated CPU resources and a balanced memory footprint.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9ae.16xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance built on the KVM hypervisor and powered by an x86_64 AMD EPYC 9T95 processor. Operating at 2.25 GHz, the instance provides 64 dedicated physical cores and 64 vCPUs with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio. It features 256.0 GB of system memory, establishing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio of 4.0 GB per core. The instance includes a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps but does not feature local storage, relying instead on network-attached storage. With its dedicated CPU allocation, the ecs.g9ae.16xlarge delivers consistent, non-shared compute performance. This resource profile is well-suited for enterprise applications, web serving, containerized environments, and mid-sized database workloads requiring reliable processing power and stable network throughput without the need for specialized GPU or local storage hardware.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9ae.16xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 64 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and 32 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for balanced enterprise workloads.

tagline: A dedicated AMD EPYC instance featuring sixty-four vCPUs and a balanced memory profile for consistent enterprise application performance.

64 dedicated physical cores and 64 vCPUs with no hyperthreading
